reviews.review_msg: His lectures are absolutely amazing--he hardly skips a beat going through the material. He gives a lot of examples of concepts and theories. He gives "collective extra credit" during the lecture on prosocial behavior, which is nice because the course is challenging for a second year class.

One of the best profs I have had in university so far. Very clear expectations, enthusiastic about the course content, and makes the course relatable and relevant to your day to day life. She was also more than willing to answer students questions.
